commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `src/simulate.ts` so the simulator sends `session.type: "realtime"`, requests audio-only Realtime responses, and prints audio transcript events in the terminal.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main sends simulator Realtime payloads that omit `session.type` and request mixed audio/text output, matching the reported API errors. I did not run the live Realtime repro myself in this read-only review.
